'''Ferrhast''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]<ref name="TEA" /> and location of the [[Imperial Institute of Higher Studies]]. Despite its distance from the [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Worlds]], ruins built by members of the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] [[Species/Legends|species]] were found on the world during the [[Galactic War]].<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|Unexpected Guests}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{Mo}}
